description: Structured, machine-evaluable policy rules (ADR-0003). The prose policy is docs/policies/updated_policy_v2.md; this file is its machine form — the deterministic engine evaluates these rules. A rule with effect 'canned' carries a pre-approved response used verbatim at compliance touchpoints (zero hallucination). Highest priority wins; no rule matching means allow.

rules.description: Credentials, secrets, and API keys are never disclosed through the assistant, regardless of role.
rules.reason: Disclosure of credentials or secrets is prohibited by policy.

rules.description: Any step handling PII-classified data routes through a pre-approved response — no LLM-drafted text at a PII touchpoint.
rules.canned_response: For privacy and compliance reasons I can't surface personal data through this assistant. Please use the secure channel your administrator has set up for personal-data requests.

rules.description: Legal-hold and litigation surfaces return a pre-approved response; the assistant does not improvise on legal matters.
rules.canned_response: This touches a legal-hold or litigation matter. I've routed it to the legal team — they will follow up through the appropriate channel.
